data.title: Programmable base editing of A•T to G•C in genomic DNA without DNA cleavage
data.abstract: The spontaneous deamination of cytosine is a major source of transitions from C to T in the genome. Here we describe adenine base editors that mediate the conversion of A•T to G•C in genomic DNA.

tldr.text: Adenine base editors are described that convert A•T to G•C in genomic DNA without double-strand breaks, expanding the scope of base editing.

data.title: Genome-wide specificities of CRISPR-Cas Cpf1 nucleases in human cells
